Book a Strategy Call

The Tamazia Instrument

See your site the way a regulator and an AI engine do.

One scored document covering compliance, search and AI visibility, with a prioritised fix for everything it finds. Enter your details below and your audit is prepared and emailed to you.

Trustpilot ★★★★★ · Google Reviews ★★★★★ · Clutch ★★★★★
  • 01

    One grade out of 100

    Your whole digital standing on a single weighted score, with regulatory compliance weighted twice as heavily as page speed.

    one report scored 39/100
  • 02

    Statutory exposure, in pounds

    Live legal liability quantified in money, with overlapping fines collapsed to your real maximum exposure.

    £23M flagged
  • 03

    400+ frameworks screened

    Every active UK, EU, US and Gulf framework checked against your published content; the ones you are breaching named.

    33 bind, 4 breached live
  • 04

    Findings, severity-tiered

    Each confirmed issue graded critical, high or standard, and tied to live evidence on your own pages.

    49 confirmed
  • 05

    Ten scored dimensions

    Regulatory, on-page SEO, technical SEO, content and E-E-A-T, Core Web Vitals, security, accessibility, AI, authority and tracking.

    pass / warn / fail
  • 06

    AI-search visibility

    How often ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Copilot and Google AI name you when buyers ask. Scored as share of voice.

    8 engines
  • 07

    Why AI cannot cite you

    The exact entity gaps, Wikidata, schema and knowledge graph, keeping you out of AI answers, on a readiness radar.

    6-point radar
  • 08

    Real Core Web Vitals

    Your measured PageSpeed pulled live from Google for mobile and desktop, with the elements costing you load time.

    mobile + desktop
  • 09

    Competitor AI ladder

    The named rivals the AI engines cite instead of you, and the readiness score you need to overtake each one.

    named head-to-head
  • 10

    A prioritised fix roadmap

    Every fix ranked P0 or P1 with the law it closes, the exposure it removes and a week-by-week trajectory.

    39 → 62 → 80
See it on your own site The same report, scored against the frameworks that govern you →

Run my audit

Tell us where to look and where to send it. No call required.

It will arrive in your inbox shortly, scored against your sector's full regulatory framework. Reference —.

REGULATORY BRIEFINGS

Receive a quarterly briefing on regulatory developments affecting your sector. No marketing, no sales. Findings only.
